pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 7 to Java 17 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if the source/target levels do not match the intended Java 17 runtime environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot release compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may not support Java 17 language features or module system correctly, leading to compilation errors.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release flag in maven-compiler-plugin.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using separate source/target is deprecated in newer Java versions; the release flag is required for correct cross-compilation and module path handling in Java 9+.

src/main/java/util/Main.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for path creation.
